scope.summary: A3b preserves the asymmetry between clean pre-change flashback capability refusals, which never quarantine, and post-window teardown failures, which remain structurally quarantined.
out_of_scope: Pinned-session recycle/reconnect behavior owned by A4e.
Workspace-wide gates in the shared dirty checkout.

entry_points.name: A3b asymmetry unit coverage
entry_points.trace: `timeout 240 env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp-db --lib query::tests -- --nocapture` exited 0 at source 707ffbd: 34 passed, including pre-window capability refusal tests and the existing read_error_plus_disable_error_is_structurally_quarantined / successful_read_plus_final_rollback_error_is_structurally_quarantined teardown-failure pins.

entry_points.name: D4 no-quarantine live acceptance
entry_points.trace: `timeout 240 env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target ORACLEMCP_D4_* cargo test -p oraclemcp-db --features live-xe --test privilege_matrix_live -- --nocapture` exited 0 at source 707ffbd: d4_no_flashback_principal_gets_typed_refusal_and_connection_stays_usable passed repeated calls and post-refusal SELECT 42 probes, proving the clean refusal did not quarantine the connection.

entry_points.name: DB package formatting and check
entry_points.trace: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo fmt --package oraclemcp-db --check` exited 0, and `timeout 240 env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo check -p oraclemcp-db` exited 0 at source 707ffbd.

limitations: Evidence was produced from the clean temporary worktree because the shared checkout contained other agents' dirty work.
No workspace-wide cargo gate is claimed.
No A4e session-recycle path was changed.
